title: asof join's result is incorrect in v1.1.0  when add filter for right table on join condition
description:
### What happens?

asof join's result is incorrect in v1.1.0  when add filter for right table on join condition

### To Reproduce

data prepare
```sql
create table t1(seq_no int,amount decimal(10,2));
insert into t1
values
(1,1.00),(2,null),(3,null),(4,null),(5,2.00),
(6,null),(7,null),(8,3.00),(9,null),(10,null),(11,5.00);
```

diff results between v1.1.0 and v1.0.0 when query as below
```sql
select * from t1;
select a.seq_no,a.amount,b.amount
  from t1 as a 
  asof join t1 as b
    on a.seq_no>=b.seq_no
   and b.amount is not null;
```
expect result:
|seq_no|amount|amount|
|---|---|---|
|1|1.00|1.00|
|2||1.00|
|3||1.00|
|4||1.00|
|5|2.00|2.00|
|6||2.00|
|7||2.00|
|8|3.00|3.00|
|9||3.00|
|10||3.00|
|11|5.00|5.00|

result in v1.1.0
|seq_no|amount|amount|
|---|---|---|
|1|1.00|1.00|
|5|2.00|2.00|
|8|3.00|3.00|
|11|5.00|5.00|

change right table with filter to sub-query.results between v1.1.0 and v1.0.0 are the same.

```sql
select a.seq_no,a.amount,b.amount
  from t1 as a
  asof join (select seq_no,amount
               from t1
              where amount is not null
            ) as b
    on a.seq_no>=b.seq_no;
```
result:
|seq_no|amount|amount|
|---|---|---|
|1|1.00|1.00|
|2||1.00|
|3||1.00|
|4||1.00|
|5|2|2.00|
|6||2.00|
|7||2.00|
|8|3|3.00|
|9||3.00|
|10||3.00|
|11|5|5.00|

v1.0.0 screenshot
![17261262705990](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7e6d4921-ed2e-4a2a-8a4e-27f290332383)
v1.1.0 screenshot
![17261261624687](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5fee500e-068d-4ebc-816a-a17a79c88b54)

### OS:

windows10 x86_64

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.0

### DuckDB Client:

cli

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

detran

### Affiliation:

sunline

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have not tested with any build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [ ] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [ ] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(seq_no INTEGER, amount REAL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, 1.00, 'first'), (2, NULL, 'second'), (3, 3.50, 'third'), (4, NULL, 'fourth'), (5, 2.00, 'fifth');
SELECT a.seq_no, a.amount, b.amount FROM t2 AS a JOIN t2 AS b ON a.seq_no >= b.seq_no AND b.amount IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.seq_no, a.amount, b.amount FROM t2 AS a JOIN (SELECT seq_no, amount FROM t2 WHERE amount IS NOT NULL) AS b ON a.seq_no >= b.seq_no;
SELECT a.seq_no, a.amount, b.amount FROM t2 AS a JOIN (SELECT seq_no, amount FROM t2 WHERE description LIKE 'f%') AS b ON a.seq_no >= b.seq_no;
key_bug_features: asof join result incorrect with filter on right table
